## Pull Request Description

### What

Brief description of the changes in this PR.

### Why

What problem does this solve? What user need does it address?

### How

Technical approach (if non-obvious or complex).

### Testing

How was this tested? Include test results or describe manual testing.

### Breaking Changes

Does this PR introduce any breaking changes?

- [ ] Yes (describe the breaking changes)
- [ ] No

### Checklist

- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I have added/updated tests (if applicable)
- [ ] All tests pass: `pnpm check`
- [ ] My code follows the project's code standards

### Screenshots (if UI changes)

Include before/after screenshots for any UI changes.

### Configuration Changes

If this PR modifies `config.ts`, document the new configuration options.

---

**By submitting this PR, I agree that my contributions will be licensed under the MIT License.**
